sources.title: Pierce Brosnan - Nomads (1986) His research comes back to haunt him
sources.description:
A French anthropologist Jean Charles Pommier (Pierce Brosnan) relocates to Los Angeles with his wife only to encounter a menacing gang of street punks, who vanish from his photographs. After Pommier dies under mysterious circumstances, ER doctor Eileen Flax inherits his memories and must race against time to protect his wife Niki from the same otherworldly threat.

Original Title: Nomads (1986) | AKA: 

⭐️ STARRING
Pierce Brosnan - Jean Charles Pommier
Lesley-Anne Down - Dr. Eileen Flax
Anna Maria Monticelli - Niki Pommier
Adam Ant - Number One
Mary Woronov - Dancing Mary
Frank Doubleday - Razor
Frances Bay - Bertril

🎬 CREW
Directed by John McTiernan (Die Hard, Predator)
Written by John McTiernan & Chelsea Quinn Yarbro (novel)
Pulse-pounding score by Bill Conti (Rocky, The Karate Kid)

🎯 WHY WATCH?
👻 Supernatural Stalkers • 🧠 Mind-Bending Mystery • 🏙️ Urban Legend Come Alive
Pierce Brosnan –John McTiernan’s directorial debut – Cult horror gem with a unique premise – where anthropology meets the afterlife!

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

Supernatural Horror • 80s Cult Classic • Psychological Thriller • Mystery • Urban Fantasy

metadata.Plot: A French anthropologist gets murdered in Los Angeles after discovering the existence of ancient demonic spirits, first described in old Inuit legends, that can take human form and prank, possess or even kill people. Before he dies, he reveals this secret to a young female doctor who quickly realizes that his wife is now in danger as well.
metadata.Actors: Lesley-Anne Down, Pierce Brosnan, Adam Ant
